title: SHARPS CONTAINER EXCHANGE PROGRAM - 211info
text: COLUMBIA COUNTY GARBAGE AND RECYCLING SHARPS CONTAINER EXCHANGE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides containers to collect and dispose of sharps (medical devices such as hypodermic needles, fingersticks, and pen injectors). Eligibility: Residential use only Hours: Clatskanie Rural Fire Protection District, 280 SE 3rd Street, OR, 97016, Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Columbia County Transfer Station, 1601 Railroad Avenue, St. Helens, OR, 97051, Monday-Saturday 8am-5pm Columbia River Fire and Rescue-Rainier Station, 211 W 2nd Street, Rainier, OR, 97048, Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Mist-Birkenfeld Rural Fire Protection District, 12525 Highway 202, Mist, OR, 97016, Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm Scappoose Rural Fire Distrct, 52751 Columbia River Highway, Scappoose, 97056, Monday-Thursday 8:30am-4:30pm Vernonia Rural Fire District, 555 E Bridge Street, Vernonia, OR, 97064, Monday-Thursday 9am-3:30pm Email (503) 397-7259 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 397-7259 Solid Waste Coordinator Other (503) 429-8252 Vernonia Rural Fire Protection District Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Vernonia site: Call for appointment All other sites: Visit website or walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Columbia County Services: Sharps Disposal Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
